name: Entourage: Unit Name
official_rules_text: During Army Building, for each unit a player includes with the Entourage keyword, 1 unit speci/f_ied by the Entourage keyword does not count its Rank towards the maximum Rank requirements for that Rank. /T_his can allow a player to bring more units of a specific Rank than Rank requirements allow. In the Command Phase, during the Issue Orders step, a unit with the Entourage keyword may issue an Order to an allied unit within 2 that has the name speci/f_ied by the Entourage keyword.
description: During Army Building, for each unit a player includes with the Entourage keyword, 1 unit speci/f_ied by the Entourage keyword does not count its Rank towards the maximum Rank requirements for that Rank. /T_his can allow a player to bring more units of a specific Rank than Rank requirements allow. In the Command Phase, during the Issue Orders step, a unit with the Entourage keyword may issue an Order to an allied unit within 2 that has the name speci/f_ied by the Entourage keyword.
